title: (Bullish Signal) LMNR, Stochastic Oscillator left the oversold zone on March 29, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that LMNR's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to buy the stock or explore call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 70 similar cases where LMNR's stochastic oscillator exited the oversold zone, and 63 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $17.19 is above $17.02 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/25/21 - 03/29/21, the price experienced a +12% Uptrend. During the week of 03/22/21 - 03/29/21, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/wl8u1pzus6q61.png?width=1539&format=png&auto=webp&s=b6448d24fa74d94a5b1bb943261c4d7f669ec545

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

LMNR moved above its 50-day Moving Average on March 25, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

​

The 10-day Moving Average for LMNR crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on March 09, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 13 of 16 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The 50-day Moving Average for LMNR moved above the 200-day moving average on November 05, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +5.80% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where LMNR advanced for three days, in 238 of 326 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 73%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 142 of 184 cases where LMNR Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 77%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10256780-limoneira-s-lmnr-17-29-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-march-29-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
